deforestation, urbanization, intensive agriculture) will increase this threat further.
mitigation coastal flood risk therefore crucial requires robust modelling methods, improving current models which lack sufficient detail combination hazards that interact estuaries.
particular, future river flow predictions rarely capture intensity timings flash floods combination with other flood-drivers such storm surge high tide.
This project will assess catchments estuaries will change under UKCP18 climate change scenarios, collaboration with Office.
Where will flash floods intense, where will this lead coastal flooding, mitigate risk?
will trained wide range research techniques, including developing hydrological ocean modelling supercomputers.
models, will interrogate existing large scale observational data climatic forecasts from Office.

this PhD, will have developed into first-rate independent researcher with deep understanding wide range issues that urgently face communities global scale.
short, will highly employable.
